sidebar.name: Shlomi Nugarker
sidebar.description: Need a web app or site built? I take it the whole way — database, API, and the interface your users actually touch — so you deal with one person who owns the result, not three teams pointing at each other.

about.heading: A bit about me.
about.lead_1: Freelance full-stack developer in Tel Aviv. I work on websites and apps
about.end_to_end_tip: Server, client, and everything in between.
about.lead_2: — from the technical side to what the user actually sees.
about.body: I like understanding what you actually need, building it clean and maintainable so it's easy to grow later, and staying around after it goes live. Usually with a fair amount of

services.heading: How I can help.
services.description: From the first idea to a live, stable product — I cover the whole development pipeline myself.

web_apps.title: Web Applications
web_apps.description: I build the whole app, start to finish — the logic, the data, and the screens the user interacts with.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: Clean, fast interfaces with React and Next.js that are easy to use and look great on any screen.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Stable servers and APIs with Node.js, connected to the right database for the job.

databases.title: Data & Integrations
databases.description: Connecting databases and third-party services — PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase, Firebase and more.

services.cta: Need one of these? Let's talk

works.heading: A few things I've built.
works.description: Real work for a client, plus projects I started myself to push my skills. Each one built from scratch, end to end.

roga.title: Roga Events
roga.description: A bilingual (Hebrew/French) marketing site I built for a corporate-wellness company — my client. A fast, multi-page site with full right-to-left support, service pages generated from simple Markdown so the team can update content themselves, optimized images, and thorough SEO so they rank on Google. Delivered with accessibility and performance in mind.

makeble.title: Makeble
makeble.description: An AI-powered website builder I designed and built end to end — describe what you want in plain English or Hebrew and it generates, previews and deploys a live Next.js app. Includes a built-in code editor and one-click publishing. "Describe it. Ship it."

wanderly.title: Wanderly
wanderly.description: A social network for travelers I built from scratch — plan multi-stop trips, share them as posts, and see community routes on an interactive map. Uses Claude AI to generate itineraries and a real-time live feed. A full-stack project covering everything from database to UI.

works.cta: Have a similar project in mind? Tell me about it

process.a: We start with a short call about what you need. You get a clear scope, timeline and price — then I build, keep you updated with working versions along the way, and we launch.

timeline.q: How long does a project take?
timeline.a: A landing or marketing site typically takes 1–3 weeks; a full web application usually 4–10 weeks, depending on scope. You get a concrete estimate before we start.

price.a: It depends on scope. After a first call you get a fixed quote — no surprises mid-project. A small site and a large application are priced very differently, so tell me what you're building.

after.a: I don't disappear. You get support after going live, and I can keep maintaining and growing the product on an ongoing basis if you want.

contact.heading: Let's build it.
contact.body: Got a project that needs a developer who'll own it end-to-end? Tell me what you're building and I'll get back to you fast. Reach me on
contact.cta_whatsapp: Send me your project on WhatsApp
contact.whatsapp_prefill: Hi Shlomi, I have a project I'd like to talk to you about
